title: Move Bookmarks Section
excerpt: if anyone has ever used Basecamp, you know exactly what I mean with their “Don’t Forget” only being 1 click away. Probably one of the best features. However on Desktop I forget its there because its another click. On Mob…

posts.author: jpellegrino89 (Joe)
posts.cookedHtml: if anyone has ever used Basecamp, you know exactly what I mean with their “Don’t Forget” only being 1 click away. Probably one of the best features. However on Desktop I forget its there because its another click. On Mobile, forget it, you need to click More → Update Feed → click the icon at the top → Bookmarks as a tiny text link. Why not put it in “My Work” so its right there for you to see.
